description: Characters who oppose, obstruct, or challenge the protagonists.
roles: Primary Villain
An ever-present opposition escalating the stakes until a final confrontation becomes inevitable.
Lieutenant
The visible face of the villain's power, confronting the protagonists directly while the true threat remains out of reach.
Rival
A competitor racing toward the same prize, injecting urgency into every decision and punishing hesitation.
Nemesis
Deeply personal enmity cutting closer than any ordinary enemy could, ensuring the conflict never stays professional.
False Friend
A trusted face concealing a calculated betrayal that shatters the party's assumptions when it lands.
Corrupt Authority
Lawful power turned weapon, transforming the systems the protagonists depend on into traps they cannot fight without becoming outlaws.
Fanatic
Sincerity hardened into something unbreakable -- an enemy who cannot be reasoned with, bought off, or shamed into doubt.
Fallen Hero
Living proof of what ruin awaits the protagonists if they lose their way, embodying the cost of failure.
Dark Mirror
A dark reflection making opposite moral choices, forcing every shortcut the protagonists consider to feel heavier.
Puppet Master
Hidden orchestration leaving the protagonists fighting symptoms while the true disease stays just out of sight.
